title: neomarica itatiaica
intro: Neomarica itatiaica, also known as the "Itatiaia Lily," is a plant species native to Brazil, belonging to the lily family and characterized by its yellow flowers and sword-shaped leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neomarica itatiaica include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its possible anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Neomarica itatiaica can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
